source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Seven pairwise different single-digit numbers are distributed among the circles shown so that the product of the three numbers that are connected by a straight line is the same in all three cases. Which number is written in the circle with the question mark? <image1>

image_dependency: Question explicitly refers to 'the circles shown' and lines connecting circles, so the topology comes from the image.
The missing-number target depends on spatial/graph relations that are not fully specified in text alone.
multi_step: Must combine several constraints: seven pairwise different single-digit numbers, three straight-line products, and equality across all three lines.
Requires using the diagram structure together with arithmetic reasoning rather than a single lookup.
The task is a constrained assignment puzzle, which typically needs multiple deductions or algebraic consistency checks.
verifiability: answer_type is numeric and answer_text is a single clear value ('2').
A proposed solution can be checked against explicit constraints: distinct digits and equal products on the three lines.
asset_registry_record.registry_passed=true and both question and answer are present.
